title: I Met a Murderer
writer: Pamela Mason, James Mason, Roy Kellino
actors: James Mason, Sylvia Coleridge, William Devlin
plot: Farmer Mark Warrow lives an unhappy existence with his shrewish wife Martha. His only happiness comes from his dog. When his wife loses her temper and kills his beloved pet, Warrow snaps and murders Martha. He goes on the run and ...
